question: What is the time zone of Salt Lake City?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?state
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Utah>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/timezone>  ?tz .
        ?state    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/class/yago/WikicatStatesOfTheUnitedStates> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/timezone>  ?tz
        FILTER ( ?state != <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Utah> )
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/San_Pedro_de_Atacama>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/timeZone>  ?tzName
        BIND(?tzName AS ?state)
      }
  }

question: What is the highest mountain in Germany?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

WHERE
  { ?mountain  rdf:type             <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Mountain> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/elevation>  ?elevation
    { ?mountain  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location>  ?location .
      ?location (<http://dbpedia.org/ontology/isPartOf>)* <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Saxony>
    }
  }

LIMIT   1

question: How many seats does the home stadium of FC Porto have?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?biggestStadium ?brazilLowestRank ?neymarPlaysForRealMadrid
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?biggestStadium
      WHERE
        { ?biggestStadium
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Stadium> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/location>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Spain> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/seatingCapacity>  ?capacity
        }
      ORDER BY DESC(?capacity)
      OFFSET  0
      LIMIT   1
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?brazilLowestRank
      WHERE
        { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Brazil_national_football_team>
                    <http://dbpedia.org/property/fifaMin>  ?brazilLowestRank
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (if(EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Neymar>
                                     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/team>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Real_Madrid_C.F.>
                         }, "Yes", "No") AS ?neymarPlaysForRealMadrid)
      WHERE
        {  }
    }
  }

question: Which classes does the Millepede belong to?
sparql:

PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?oldestChild ?isTreeFrogAmphibian ?almaMater
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

question: Give me all cars that are produced in Germany.
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?smallestCity ?actor ?chancellor
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?smallestCity
      WHERE
        { ?m        <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#broader>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:Cities_in_Germany> .
          ?smallestCity
                    <http://purl.org/dc/terms/subject>  ?m ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/areaTotal>  ?area
        }
      ORDER BY ?area
      LIMIT   1
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?actor
        WHERE
          { ?actor  rdf:type  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Actor>
              { ?actor  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany> }
            UNION
              { ?actor  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/birthPlace>  ?place .
                ?place  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Germany>
              }
          }
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?chancellor
        WHERE
          { ?chancellor  rdf:type  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person>
              { ?chancellor  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/office>  "Chancellor of Germany"@en }
            UNION
              { ?chancellor  <http://dbpedia.org/property/office>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Chancellor_of_Germany> }
          }
      }
  }
LIMIT   100

question: Which poet wrote the most books?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ?uri (COUNT(?book) AS ?bookCount)
        WHERE
          { ?uri   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/occupation>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Poet> .
            ?book  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?uri ;
                   rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Book>
          }
        GROUP BY ?uri
        ORDER BY DESC(?bookCount)
        LIMIT   1
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ?uri (COUNT(?book) AS ?bookCount)
        WHERE
          { ?uri   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/occupation>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Musician> .
            ?book  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/author>  ?uri ;
                   rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Book>
          }
        GROUP BY ?uri
        ORDER BY DESC(?bookCount)
        LIMIT   1
      }
    UNION
      { ?uri  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Writer> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/award>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Nobel_Prize_in_Literature>
      }
  }

question: Which languages are spoken in Estonia?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?estoniaLanguages ?turkmenistanLanguageCount ?countryWithMostOfficialLanguages
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?languageEstonia ; separator=', ') AS ?estoniaLanguages)
      WHERE
        { ?languageEstonia
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spokenIn>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Estonia>
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?languageTurkmenistan) AS ?turkmenistanLanguageCount)
      WHERE
        { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Turkmenistan>
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/language>  ?languageTurkmenistan
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?countryWithMostOfficialLanguages
      WHERE
        { ?countryWithMostOfficialLanguages
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/officialLanguages>  ?officialLang
        }
      GROUP BY ?countryWithMostOfficialLanguages
      ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?officialLang))
      LIMIT   1
    }
  }

question: Who founded Intel?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?query ?answer

                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundationPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Beijing>
        BIND("Which electronics companies were founded in Beijing?" AS ?question)
        BIND(?query AS ?answer)

      { BIND("When were the Hells Angels founded?" AS ?question)
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Hells_Angels>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/founded>  ?answer
        BIND(<http://dbpedia.org/resource/Hells_Angels> AS ?query)

                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundedBy>  ?answer .
        ?answer   rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Pope>

        BIND(?answer AS ?query)

  }

question: How many rivers and lakes are in South Carolina?
Who was called Rodzilla?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?personCalledMary ?starInSpanishMovies ?arnoldAttendedUniversity
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Abraham_Lincoln>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?spouse .
        ?spouse   rdfs:label            ?labelSpouse
        FILTER langMatches(lang(?labelSpouse), "EN")
        BIND(if(regex(?labelSpouse, "^Mary", "i"), true, false) AS ?personCalledMary)
      }
    UNION
      { ?film  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Film> ;
               <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Spain> ;
               <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/producer>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Benicio_del_Toro> ;
               <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/starring>  ?star .
        ?star  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person>
        BIND(?star AS ?starInSpanishMovies)
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Arnold_Schwarzenegger>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/almaMater>  ?uni .
        ?uni      rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/University>
        BIND(true AS ?arnoldAttendedUniversity)
      }
  }
LIMIT   10
